title: Amtech T0703 30mm Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 30mm rhombic padlock has a chrome plated iron body with a protective plastic cover and an anti-saw, anti-cut 5mm diameter hardened steel shackle
TAMPER RESISTANT: Supplied with 3 keys, it has an anti-pick precision pin tumbler and domino key mechanism
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 30mm Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock See more
